name: Dachigam National Park
description: A stunning high-altitude protected reserve, world-famous as the only home of the critically endangered Hangul (Kashmir Stag), as well as Himalayan black bears and leopards.
history: The name 'Dachigam' means 'Ten Villages', signifying the ten villages that were relocated to create this reserve, which originally supplied clean drinking water to Srinagar.
famousFor: Kashmir Stag (Hangul), pristine alpine forests, wildlife safaris.
bestTime: April to August (Upper areas), September to November (Lower areas)
